name: SGLang to Neutree
description: Convert open-source SGLang Dashboard to Neutree-integrated version

filter_rules.name: drop_existing_model_name_filter
filter_rules.description: Strip the upstream {model_name=~"$model_name"} filter so we can replace it with Neutree multi-dimensional filters in the next rule

filter_rules.name: normalize_sglang_metric_namespace
filter_rules.description: Store SGLang metric names in the canonical upstream namespace form used by Neutree vmagent relabeling: sglang:<metric>.

filter_rules.name: inject_neutree_filters
filter_rules.description: Append Neutree multi-tenant filters to every sglang:<name>(_<word>)* metric reference. Matches both unfiltered and filter-stripped forms; the look-ahead guards against double-injection on metrics that are already followed by an opening brace.
